evals.prompt: Add a note — distributed teams need over-communication to replace the ambient awareness you get in an office
evals.expected_output: Captures the thought to today's daily note (Daily/YYYYMMDD-daily.md) as a timestamped bullet, creating the daily note if it doesn't exist. Does not open Obsidian.

evals.prompt: What fleeting notes haven't become permanent yet?
evals.expected_output: Lists contents of Fleeting/ folder, reads each note, and presents them with a summary and suggested next action (promote, discard, link, later) for each.

evals.prompt: I want to promote my fleeting note on context switching into a permanent note
evals.expected_output: Finds the context switching fleeting note, rewrites it as an atomic claim with a statement-style title, confirms with the user before moving, moves the file to Permanent/, and suggests 2-3 existing notes to link to.

evals.prompt: I'm about to start work on beyondmidi, what do I have on it?
evals.expected_output: Queries the vault for beyondmidi-related notes (searches by tag #beyondmidi and keyword, finds the index note, reads relevant permanent notes), and presents a useful summary of accumulated thinking.
